ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the model is used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* The machine learning algorithm used */,
  "framework" TEXT /* The ML framework used */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data used for training */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* The budget allocated to the department for ML projects */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* The number of team members in the department */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* The last date the department's ML projects were reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* The department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* The last date the user was active on the platform */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON object containing specific permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "fn" REAL /* False negatives (FN) */,
  "fp" REAL /* False positives (FP) */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) */,
  "tn" REAL /* True negatives (TN) */,
  "tp" REAL /* True positives (TP) */,
  "sr" INTEGER /* Sample rate (sr) */,
  "t" INTEGER /* Training time (t) in seconds */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* The ratio of the dataset split */,
  "cross_validation" INTEGER /* Whether cross-validation was used during evaluation */,
  "k_folds" INTEGER /* The number of folds used in cross-validation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training session */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used during training (stored as JSON) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* The loss value at the end of training */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* The loss value on the validation set */,
  "early_stopping" INTEGER /* Whether early stopping was used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* The commit hash from the version control system */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the dataset used for training the version */,
  "evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the evaluation metrics for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the access permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the log */,
  "log_context" TEXT /* Additional context or details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* The type of metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value used for the metric (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* The type of comment (e.g., note, issue, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for prediction (stored as JSON) */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* The type of prediction (e.g., binary, multiclass, regression) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
